title: Paranoia
tagline: Who said your name… and why?

rules.title: Paranoia
rules.tagline: Who said your name… and why?

steps.title: The questioner sees a question
steps.desc: Like "who would crack in prison?". They keep it secret.

steps.title: The target sees the question and chooses
steps.desc: They point at someone in the group. Out loud.

steps.title: The group hears the answer, not the question
Heads or tails — reveal or not
steps.desc: If the target loses the flip, the question shows to everyone.

handoff.subtitleQuestioner: You will see a question. Keep it secret.
handoff.subtitleTarget: A question is about you. You'll see which one.

questionShow.hint: Ask the question out loud… but without saying it 😶

targetPick.pickSub: And pick the person in the app.

reveal.keptTextBefore: keeps the question to themselves. The group stays in the dark.

questions.text: Who would make the best parent?
Who has the worst taste in music?
Who would you go on a road trip with?
Who lies the best?
Who has the most embarrassing crush?
Who would crack first in prison?
Who would make the worst ex?
Who has the most striking glow-up?
Who would survive a zombie apocalypse?
Who has the most skeletons in the closet?
Who is secretly the meanest?
Who would make the best reality TV star?
Who would be the worst roommate?
Who is the most jealous?
Who would send the most messages after a breakup?
Who is the most dramatic over nothing?
Who would be the most corruptible?
Who could sell anything to anyone?
Who would ghost someone for no reason?
Who would go viral on TikTok for the worst reason?
Who falls in love the fastest?
Who is most likely to get a drunk tattoo?
Who could accidentally join a cult?
Who would be the scariest when angry?
Who would fake being sick to avoid something?
Who could forget their own birthday?
Who is most likely to stalk their ex?
Who would make the best robber?
Who is most likely to end up in jail overnight?
Who would survive the least amount of time alone on an island?
Who could accidentally start a rumor?
Who would make the best sugar baby?
Who is most likely to get married on impulse?
Who would fight over a parking spot?
Who has the most contagious laugh?
Who could disappear for 3 days without answering?
Who would give the worst wedding speech?
Who would date a celebrity just for clout?
Who is most likely to cry at the club?
Who could accidentally become an influencer?
Who is secretly manipulative without realizing it?
Who could ruin a vacation in one day?
Who is most likely to get fired for a ridiculous reason?
Who would be the most dangerous with unlimited money?
Who could secretly have a double life?
Who would be the worst on a survival show?
Who could accidentally leave someone behind at a party?
Who would be the scariest passive-aggressive person?
Who is most likely to send a text they regret?
Who could become famous overnight?
